text: Iteration 3 fixes resolve all 3 critical audit items (BadgeApprovalQueue touch target, PWAInstallBanner theme tokens, CelebrationOverlay dismiss). Most important/minor issues are correctly addressed. However, a dark-mode contrast regression was introduced in BadgeCard, and 10+ important issues remain unfixed: StreakBadge hardcoded colors, BottomNav label size, EventSeriesForm partial disabled-state, missing autoFocus in ConfirmDialog, missing aria and focus-ring gaps in OrgProfileForm/DashboardShell/StepEducation, and hardcoded reds in OpportunityForm/PointsCard. Several motion-safe: prefixes and focus-visible:ring additions are also still missing from event components. The PR is on the right track but not yet mergeable.

reasoning: One critical regression (BadgeCard dark mode contrast) plus ~15 important unfixed issues. All are straightforward pattern-based fixes with low regression risk, but the BadgeCard dark contrast requires careful color token selection to avoid another regression. Confidence is medium because the number of unfixed items suggests the autofix may miss edge cases.

message: Complete dismiss implementation: Escape key handler (useEffect), backdrop click handler, and close button with min-44px touch target. All three dismissal mechanisms from the audit are properly implemented.
Hardcoded emerald/teal colors correctly replaced with theme tokens (from-brand-primary/90, from-brand-secondary/90) with dark-mode variants. The gradient background now properly adapts to theme.
Review button now has min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] with flex centering — the bare-text touch-target issue is fixed. Search input also bumped to py-3.
All semantic <th> elements now have scope='col'. The Manage action link touch target increased from py-1.5 to py-3 with min-h-[44px].
Loading spinner now uses motion-safe:animate-spin — respects prefers-reduced-motion.
Container changed from <div> to <nav> with aria-label='Pagination' — proper landmark for screen readers.
Emoji medals replaced with Lucide Trophy/Award/Medal SVG icons — follows project conventions.

Dark mode contrast regression: bg-brand-primary maps to #34d399 in dark mode, which is lighter than the original emerald-500 (#10b981). White text on #34d399 yields ~2.5:1 contrast ratio, below WCAG SC 1.4.11 minimum of 3:1 for non-text content. The original hardcoded bg-emerald-500 text-white was borderline ~3:1, but the token migration made it worse.
suggestion: Use dark-mode-aware styling: earned ? 'bg-brand-primary text-white dark:text-brand-text' : '...' or define a darker dark-mode primary shade that maintains 3:1+ contrast with white text.

message: Audit issue #15 not fixed: Still uses hardcoded Tailwind amber colors (bg-amber-100, text-amber-500, text-amber-700, dark:bg-amber-900/30, dark:text-amber-400) instead of theme tokens like bg-brand-accent/10, text-brand-accent.
suggestion: Replace with theme tokens: bg-brand-accent/10 dark:bg-brand-accent/20 (container), text-brand-accent (icon), text-brand-accent/80 dark:text-brand-accent (count).

message: Audit issue (label text [10px]) not fixed: Label text remains text-[10px] (<11px minimum recommended for accessibility).
suggestion: Bump to text-xs (12px) or text-[11px] with tighter letter-spacing if needed for space constraints.

message: Audit item #2 (autoFocus) not implemented: Cancel button still missing autoFocus attribute. Keyboard users must tab through the entire page to reach dialog controls.
suggestion: Add autoFocus to the Cancel <Button> so the dialog auto-focuses its first interactive element when opened.

message: Partial fix for audit issue #7 (disabled during submission): title, description, interval fields are disabled, but 5 interactive elements remain active — frequency buttons (L240-251), day-of-week buttons (L261-273), virtual toggle (L345-369), end condition radio buttons (L383-416), and end condition conditional inputs (L405, L422).
suggestion: Add disabled={isSubmitting} or pointer-events-none + opacity-60 to all remaining interactive elements during submission.

message: LocationSelect error banner uses hardcoded red colors (bg-red-50, border-red-200, text-red-700) instead of theme tokens. The server error at line 121 was correctly migrated but this one was missed.
suggestion: Replace with bg-brand-error/10 border-brand-error/20 text-brand-error matching the pattern used in the server error.

message: Email <input> missing aria-invalid={!!errors.email} and aria-describedby={errors.email ? 'email-error' : undefined}. The name field was correctly fixed but email was missed. Screen readers will not announce email validation errors.
suggestion:
Add aria-invalid and aria-describedby to the email input, linked to the error

element by id.

message: Name error message (line 100) and website error message (line 171) lack role='alert'. The email error at line 155 has it correctly. Dynamic validation errors without role='alert' are not announced by screen readers.
suggestion: Add role='alert' to name and website error message containers.

message: CTA <Link> element still missing focus-visible:ring. This is a keyboard-focusable element with no visible focus indicator — screen reader and keyboard-only users get no visual feedback.
suggestion: Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none to the CTA link className.

message: Secondary quick-action arrow uses group-hover:translate-x-0.5 transition-colors without motion-safe: prefix. The CTA arrow at line 167 was fixed but this was missed.
suggestion: Prefix with motion-safe: group-hover:translate-x-0.5 motion-safe:transition-colors.

message: Progress bar uses transition-all duration-500 without motion-safe: prefix. Same class of issue as audit items across the codebase.
suggestion: Add motion-safe: prefix to transition-all duration-500.

message: 'Remove' certification button uses hardcoded hover:text-red-500 instead of theme token hover:text-brand-error.
suggestion: Replace hover:text-red-500 with hover:text-brand-error.

message: Certification input uses py-2.5 (~36px touch target). While improved from original py-2 (~30px), still below 44px WCAG 2.5.8 minimum.
suggestion: Add min-h-[44px] or change to py-3.

message: Error state uses hardcoded red colors (bg-red-100, text-red-500, text-red-600) with added dark: variants instead of migration to theme tokens. Previous review flagged this but it was only partially addressed.
suggestion: Replace with bg-brand-error/10, text-brand-error, text-brand-error/80.

message: Recurring toggle (both instances at lines 99 and 146) has transition-colors duration-200 and transition-transform duration-200 without motion-safe: prefix. Does not respect prefers-reduced-motion.
suggestion: Prefix transition classes with motion-safe: on both toggle containers and knob elements.

message: Frequency selection buttons (DAILY/WEEKLY/MONTHLY/CUSTOM) lack focus-visible:ring for keyboard focus indication.
suggestion: Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none.

message: Day-of-week selection buttons (Sun-Sat) lack focus-visible:ring for keyboard focus indication.
suggestion: Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none.

message: Close button (X icon) is missing focus-visible:ring. Keyboard users navigating via Tab get no branded focus indicator.
suggestion: Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none.

message: Add certification button lacks focus-visible:ring for keyboard focus indication.
suggestion: Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none.

message: Dropdown menu (role='menu') has no keyboard navigation. WCAG 4.1.2 requires ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Home/End navigation for menu role.
suggestion: Add onKeyDown handler for ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Home/End navigation, or use an accessible menu library.

message: Action column spacer <th> lacks scope='col'. Other header cells were fixed but this one was overlooked.
suggestion: Add scope='col' to the action column's <th> element.

message: Error message uses text-red-500 instead of theme token text-brand-error.
suggestion: Replace with text-brand-error.

message: CATEGORY_COLORS map uses entirely hardcoded Tailwind color classes instead of theme tokens.
suggestion: Consider using CSS custom properties per category or a theme-aware utility approach.

message: Install button uses focus-visible:ring-white/50 on white (bg-white) background — white-on-white ring is nearly invisible.
suggestion: Use focus-visible:ring-brand-primary or focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2.

message: Dismiss button uses focus-visible:ring-white/50 against brand-primary gradient — ~2.5:1 contrast, below WCAG 3:1 minimum for focus indicators.
suggestion: Use focus-visible:ring-white/70 or focus-visible:ring-white.

message: focus-visible:rounded applies default border-radius while sibling elements use branded rounded values — inconsistent visual appearance.
suggestion: Replace focus-visible:rounded with focus-visible:rounded-sm or focus-visible:rounded-md.

message: Uses text-destructive (shadcn/ui token) for upload error, while rest of codebase consistently uses text-brand-error. Pre-existing inconsistency.
suggestion: Replace text-destructive with text-brand-error.

message: Backdrop div had role='button' with tabIndex={-1} — role='button' makes it discoverable via screen reader but tabIndex={-1} prevents keyboard focus, making the onKeyDown handler unreachable. Fixed in this iteration but the pattern should be avoided.
suggestion: The fix (removing role='button' and tabIndex={-1} and using a Click handler on the backdrop div with a type guard) is correct.

message: Spinner uses border-current/30 border-t-current. On cta variant (bg-brand-cta text-white), spinner is white-on-white with partial transparency — nearly invisible when stationary.
suggestion: Consider a fixed contrast color: border-white/30 border-t-white for all variants on dark backgrounds.

message: transition-colors without motion-safe: prefix on icon variant button. Same issue on button variant at line 68.
suggestion: Add motion-safe: prefix to all transition classes.

message: ThemeToggleButton (mounted state) lacks focus-visible:ring while all other interactive elements in this PR received it.
suggestion: Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none.

message: Social icon buttons use bg-brand-surface matching footer background — touch target area has no visible container until hover.
suggestion: Add a subtle border like border border-brand-border so the touch target is visually apparent.
